featured_projects.title: GitScope
featured_projects.description: A Chrome extension plus web dashboard that adds deep GitHub profile insights including stats grids, coding personality analysis, language breakdowns, activity heatmaps, contribution tracking, and cross-profile leaderboards. Includes GitHub OAuth analytics tracking.
features: 9-stat profile grid with coding personality insights
Language breakdown and activity heatmap visualisation
Contribution donut and repo growth timeline

featured_projects.title: Ledger Sync
featured_projects.description: A self-hosted personal finance intelligence platform with AI chatbot capabilities, supporting CSV/Excel ingestion, financial forecasting, tax estimation, FIRE planning, and multi-metric financial health scoring.
features: AI finance chatbot with 15 tool-based query system
CSV/Excel bank statement ingestion with deduplication

featured_projects.title: LeetCode Rating Predictor
featured_projects.description: A full-stack ML system that predicts LeetCode contest ratings using a dense neural network trained on 121K+ contest records, with FastAPI backend and React frontend.
features: Dense neural network trained on 121K+ contest records
Glassmorphism UI with live contest selection
Full test suite with 40+ backend/frontend tests

featured_projects.title: Blue Green AWS Terraform
featured_projects.description: Infrastructure-as-code system implementing zero-downtime Blue-Green deployments on AWS using Terraform, ECS Fargate, ALB, and CodePipeline.
features: Automated CI/CD pipeline with CodePipeline and CodeBuild
KMS encryption and IAM least-privilege security model

featured_projects.title: Instagram Likes Leaderboard
featured_projects.description: Browser-based Instagram analytics tool with leaderboard ranking, follower insights, ghost follower detection, and engagement tracking. Runs entirely client-side.

featured_projects.title: Personal Portfolio
featured_projects.description: A dark-themed interactive portfolio with 3D WebGL hero scene, particle effects, and data-driven architecture.

collaborative_projects.title: Code Arena
collaborative_projects.description: Real-time competitive coding platform with multiplayer races, sandboxed execution, and live WebSocket-based competition system.
features: Blind race mode for fair competition
Live status board and timer sync
Monaco editor with test case runner

collaborative_projects.title: Placemento
collaborative_projects.description: Placement management system for MCA NIT Warangal with analytics dashboards, role-based access control, and student/company tracking.

other_projects.title: Instagram Autopilot
other_projects.description: AI-powered automation system for generating and posting Instagram content using AWS Bedrock and scheduled workflows.

other_projects.title: Financial Dashboard
other_projects.description: Personal finance analytics dashboard with Excel ingestion, investment tracking, tax planning, and lifestyle optimisation tools.

community_projects.title: Claude Skills
community_projects.description: Plugin marketplace for Claude Code with reusable automation skills, agents, hooks, and slash commands.
